messages.content: I am tracing one flow across these Python service files. Walk me through what happens when Checkout.submit_order runs — specifically how it captures the payment via capture_payment. I only care about that path; skip the rest.

# ===== src/payments/payments.py =====
from payments.gateway import PaymentGateway
from lib.logger import logger


class Payments:
    def __init__(self, gateway):
        self.gateway = gateway

    def capture_payment(self, amount, token):
        idem = f"{token}:{amount}"
        res = self.gateway.send_charge(amount=amount, token=token, idem=idem)
        logger.info("captured", ok=res.ok)
        return res

    def refund_payment(self, charge_id, amount):
        self.gateway.send_charge(amount=-amount, ref=charge_id, idem=charge_id)
        logger.info("refunded", charge_id=charge_id)
